prompt: “Imprint the text as if hot-stamped in leather—deep emboss, slight edge burn, dusty residue around letters.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1: Transform the existing 'CHRISTIAN LOUBOUTIN' text to appear deeply hot-stamped into a textured leather surface. Implement a pronounced, deep embossed effect for the letters, making them look significantly sunken into the material. Add a subtle, dark edge burn around the perimeter of each letter, indicative of heat application. Finally, include fine, light-colored dusty residue scattered immediately around the base and edges of the imprinted text.
objects: Deeply hot-stamped and embossed text impression
Subtle dark edge burn around text letters
Fine, light-colored dusty residue around text
